title: helichrysum setosum
intro: Helichrysum setosum, also known as the silver woolly everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and small yellow flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum setosum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
